commands.review_summary:
Adds a `memory.recall.skipped` memory-host event and regression coverage so durable memory hits excluded from short-term promotion are logged without changing promotion eligibility.

PR surface: Source +64, Tests +81. Total +145 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main filters recall tracking to short-term paths and returns with no event when only durable memory paths are present. I did not run a local executable repro because this review is read-only.
